serviceTagline: We find businesses that need your service and put you in front of them — you just show up to the conversation
serviceContext: Most small businesses wait for customers to find them. We flip that — we reach out to the right people on your behalf every month, so your inbox fills up instead of sitting quiet. No ad spend, no long contracts — just new conversations with potential customers.
pricing: Starter    $299/mo  → 100 outreach emails/mo + monthly report Growth     $499/mo  → 300 emails + social media (2 platforms) Full       $799/mo  → Unlimited emails + social + website management
